title: Announcement on Course Registrations for the Fall Semester of 2025–2026
content:
Announcement on Course Registrations for the Fall Semester of 2025–2026

Attention Students,

Graduate School course registration for the Fall Semester of the 2025/2026 Academic Year has begun. Course assignments for our students (except for the Clinical Psychology and Psychology programs; students in these programs will select their own courses) will be made by the Graduate School by October 3, 2025. Accordingly, our courses will begin on October 4, 2025.

We wish all our students success in the new academic year.

You can log in to the Student Information System at https://obs.esenyurt.edu.tr by following the steps below.

After logging into the system, you must fill in all the information on the screen completely.

Logging into the Online Course System:

Your https://eslms.esenyurt.edu.tr login password has been updated so that you can log in using your Turkish ID number. You can log into the system by entering your student number in the username field, preceded by a lowercase “o,” and your Turkish ID number in the password field.
